authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(112) — Portuguese Creek, West Fork (Madera Co.)
sources.quotedText: (112) Portuguese Creek, West Fork (Madera Co.) from headwaters downstream to confluence with the East Fork Portuguese Creek. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 264971, "Portuguese Creek", Stream, Madera Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":264971,"gaz_name":"Portuguese Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Madera","objectid_1":71039,"isunknowncoords":2}; geometry multipoint with 4 vertices, mouth to source (Web Mercator → WGS84): mouth 37.46967°N 119.38042°W (~5672 ft); 37.49911°N 119.37376°W (~6869 ft); 37.50967°N 119.37904°W (~7479 ft); source 37.52022°N 119.37209°W (~8560 ft). GNIS has no separate record for a Madera Co. 'West Fork' or 'East Fork' of Portuguese Creek (GNIS's only 'East Fork Portuguese Creek', gaz_id 222893, is an unrelated stream in Siskiyou Co.); this single Madera Co. 'Portuguese Creek' line is the closest authoritative GNIS match for the CCR §7.50(b)(112) reach (headwaters downstream to confluence with the East Fork). File coordinates (-119.3780, 37.4940, ~6698 ft elev.) fall directly on this line between the two lowest vertices, ~680 m from the nearest recorded vertex (37.49911°N, 119.37376°W) and in the correct elevation band for the described reach — confirmed as plausible given no finer-grained, fork-specific GNIS point exists.
